LightningComponentBundle.description: Renders a conditional survey and submits the response in a single DML.

property.name: surveyName
property.label: Survey Name
property.description: API name of the Survey__c record to render. Must be Active.

property.name: entityMapping
property.label: Entity Mapping JSON
property.description: Advanced/manual JSON of {Survey_Response field API name -> record Id}, e.g. {"Account__c":"001..."}. Leave blank on a Record Page if you use Entity Mapping Field below; merged together if both are set.

property.name: entityMappingField
property.label: Entity Mapping Field
property.description: On a Record Page only: API name of the Survey_Response__c lookup field to link automatically to the record being viewed, e.g. "Account__c" on an Account page. The record Id is picked up automatically — no need to type it.

property.name: surveyName
property.label: Survey Name
property.description: API name of the Survey__c record to render. Must be Active.

property.name: entityMapping
property.label: Entity Mapping JSON
property.description: Advanced/manual JSON of {Survey_Response field API name -> record Id}, e.g. {"Account__c":"001..."}. Leave blank if you use Entity Mapping Field + Record Id below; merged together if both are set.

property.name: entityMappingField
property.label: Entity Mapping Field
property.description: API name of the Survey_Response__c lookup field to link to Record Id below, e.g. "Account__c".

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Id to store in Entity Mapping Field. Bind it to a Flow variable (e.g. a recordId input variable populated when the flow is launched from a record) — Flow does not auto-inject this like Lightning App Builder does.

property.name: isCompleted
property.label: Is Completed
property.description: True once the respondent has submitted the survey. Read it after this screen to branch the flow.

property.name: surveyResponseId
property.label: Survey Response Id
property.description: Id of the created Survey_Response__c record. Available after Is Completed becomes true.
